description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the default runner image and runs a before_script which updates apt-get, installs python3-pip, installs docker-compose via pip, and starts the compose services with docker-compose up -d. Add a single job named unittest that runs the command docker-compose exec ecognomy pytest. The pipeline has no explicit stages, caches, artifacts, or rules, so the job runs on every pipeline execution.
